name: Frozen Lemon Souffle
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Lemon Juice OR Lime Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch, and gelatin.
2. Add water and lemon or lime juice to the mixture.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring until slightly thickened.
4. Stir in a few drops of food coloring (yellow or green) if desired.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
6. Chill until partially set, about 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
7. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
8. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the chilled juice mixture.
9. In another small bowl, beat whipping cream until stiff peaks form.
10. Fold the whipped cream into the juice mixture.
11. Securely wrap the rim of a 1-quart souffle dish with waxed paper or foil using a 3-inch collar.
12. Pour the batter into the prepared dish.
13. Freeze for 6 hours or overnight.
14. Remove the collar and garnish with whipped cream, candy lemon drops, and gum drop slivers if desired.
15. Return any leftovers to the freezer.
